title: phacelia glandulosa subsp. euglandulosa
intro: Phacelia glandulosa subsp. euglandulosa, also known as Mexican phacelia, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. The health benefits of Mexican phacelia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever. Mexican phacelia is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
